data.title: Multitude AG: Fitch assigns Multitude’s Subordinated Hybrid Perpetual Notes Final 'B-' Rating
data.description: On March 26, 2026, European FinTech company Multitude AG revealed that its subsidiary, Multitude Capital Oyj, had been issued subordinated hybrid perpetual notes by Fitch Ratings. The final long-term rating assigned to these notes is 'B-', with a Recovery Rating of 'RR6'. Multitude AG provides digital lending and online banking services to a wide range of clients, including consumers, SMEs, and institutional clients.

data.title: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico Announces the Payment of Bond Certificate “GAP 23L” for Ps.1,120.0 Million
data.description: Mexico-based Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP) revealed that they have successfully paid off the bond certificate "GAP 23L" today. The payment covered a total of 11.2 million certificates, amounting to Ps.1,120.0 million.

data.title: RCI Banque issues €900M fixed rate notes maturing in February 2030.
data.description: In a recent study, data shows that there has been a significant decrease in unemployment rates in the United States. The latest numbers reveal that the national unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, marking a substantial improvement from the previous month's rate of 5.1%. This decline represents 500,000 individuals finding employment during this period. Additionally, the survey highlights a notable increase in job availability, with approximately 800,000 new job openings reported across various sectors. The data suggests a positive trend in the job market, signaling potential economic growth and recovery in the near future.

data.title: Progressives tout Virginia wins as key to 'affordability' message
data.description: Proponents of progressive labor are optimistic about a series of bills approved by Virginia legislators, seeing them as a model for Democratic triumph across the country in the approaching midterm elections.

data.title: Trump’s Iran strikes shake global trade lines
data.description: The United States' actions in Iran are now impacting global supply chains, as significant container shipping companies are withdrawing vessels from Gulf routes and reconsidering transportation of goods in the Middle East region.

data.title: VEON and JazzWorld Receive Competition Commission of Pakistan Approval for Acquisition of TPL Insurance
data.description: Approval for the competition is the next step towards creating a wide-ranging digital financial services network in Pakistan, which will speed up the growth of digital financial services in the region.

data.title: Is Trump’s tariff pivot legal?
data.description: President Donald Trump has taken steps to implement a section of his tariff plan governed by Section 122 of the Trade Act of 1974. This action has brought scrutiny to the regulation’s criteria concerning the "balance of payments" metric.

data.title: EEOC warnings land on prepared corporate America
data.description: The recent letter from Equal Employment Opportunity Commission Chair Andrea Lucas to Fortune 500 companies cautioning that their diversity, equity, and inclusion policies could potentially discriminate against specific employees has not come as a shock to many. Business and trade organizations, several of which had already begun scaling back such initiatives, have shown little surprise at this warning.

data.title: Clariane announces the success of its offering of €500 million of senior notes

data.title: DOL probe takes on a life of its own
data.description: The investigation surrounding Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer and her associates raises the question of when a ban is truly a ban. This inquiry has been prompting widespread scrutiny as officials delve into the matter.

data.title: Multitude Capital Oyj and Multitude AG bought back more outstanding capital notes.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that unemployment in the country has reached a record high of 10.2%, with over 15 million individuals currently out of work. This significant spike in unemployment rates is largely attributed to the economic downturn caused by the global pandemic. Additionally, the report highlighted that youth unemployment has also risen to 24.5%, indicating a grim outlook for the younger workforce. The government has implemented various measures to address the issue, including stimulus packages and job creation programs. Experts are urging for further action to mitigate the increasing unemployment numbers and stabilize the economy.

data.title: Employers are winning the gig worker messaging war
data.description: Gig employers are dominating the conversation on the classification of app-based workers, with growing support for keeping drivers as independent contractors. However, labor advocates and certain Democrats assert that this classification hinders workers' capacity to unionize.

data.title: Best Gold IRA Companies Of 2026 Released By Investors Circle
data.description: After conducting thorough industry research, Investors Circle has announced that Goldco has been named the top Gold IRA company for 2026. The rankings were released in Chicago on April 24. Investors Circle is known for its unbiased reviews on precious metals investing. This recognition comes after months of in-depth analysis, solidifying Goldco's position in the market.

data.title: Top memecoin owners to join Trump for lunch in Florida. Tron founder Justin Sun, suing Trump crypto business, status unsure.
data.description: The American President has officially stated he will be present at the upcoming Florida function, although it remains uncertain if Tron founder, Justin Sun, will attend. Sun is currently engaged in a legal battle against the crypto business owned by the Trump family.

data.title: $48M in tokenized gold allocated by Aurelion to XAUE protocol for yield generation, trading, and lending on underlying asset.
data.description: Through the XAUE protocol, individuals can generate yield by engaging in lending and trading activities with tokenized gold, all the while retaining exposure to the actual asset.

data.title: Brazil bans prediction market platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi citing investor protection worries and growing gambling addiction.
data.description: The Finance Ministry of Brazil recently halted operations of platforms such as Polymarket and Kalshi due to concerns regarding the protection of investors. This decision was also driven by an increase in instances of gambling addiction in the country. The action came as a response to the growing popularity of these platforms, which have attracted a significant number of users in Brazil. The exact number of users affected by this move was not disclosed, but it underscores the government's commitment to safeguarding investors and addressing social issues related to online gambling.

data.title: Spring Tree Root Growth May Cause Costly Pipe Damage
data.description: As temperatures rise and plants begin to flourish in the Dallas-Fort Worth Metroplex, Bacon Plumbing, Heating, Air & Electric stresses the importance of taking preventive measures to save homeowners thousands. The company advises residents to stay vigilant and proactive during this time of year to prevent potential issues. By being proactive and addressing any potential problems early on, homeowners can avoid costly repairs in the long run. As of April 24, 2026, the company emphasizes the necessity of these preventive steps to ensure the well-being of homes in the area.

data.title: CPKC reaches tentative long-term hourly collective agreements with SMART‑TD and BLET
data.description: Today, Canadian Pacific Kansas City announced the establishment of new preliminary collective bargaining deals with the Sheet Metal, Air, Rail and Transportation Works – Transportation Division (SMART-TD) and the Brotherhood of... The agreements are subject to final approval but mark a significant milestone for the company. Canadian Pacific Kansas City operates under the tickers TSX: CP, NYSE: CP, and CPKC, and plays a crucial role in the transportation sector. The specifics of the agreements, including any pertinent numbers, were not disclosed.

data.title: Hippocratic AI Expands Footprint, Partners with Leading Health Systems to Improve Patient Outcomes
data.description: A company based in Palo Alto, California, called Hippocratic AI has announced the addition of new partners to enhance patient outcomes through the use of secure generative AI Voice Agents.
